name: Lúth-Violetfrost
personality: Gleaming violet-tinted feathers beneath a tiny duck hat, Lúth-Violetfrost's ✦ eyes spot the opportunity to redesign the build system at the worst possible moment, cheerfully indifferent to the patience required to clean it up.
defaultPersonality: A tuxedo-wearing professional who waddles through your codebase with dignified concern and dry wit.
